title: Book your appointment
description: Fill out this form to manage your attendance. We'll make sure to have everything ready for you.

form.workshopError: Please select the workshop you wish to attend.
form.contactError: Please provide an email address or a contact phone number.
form.dateError: Please select a date on the calendar.

allergies.label: Allergies or important contraindications
allergies.helper: Select if you have any sensitivities we should know about.
allergies.error: Please select at least one allergy or specify in the 'Other' field.

successModal.title: Your appointment is in progress
successModal.text1: We have registered the request for the workshop
successModal.text2: We will contact you shortly using the details provided to fully confirm your spot.
successModal.question: Do you want to request another appointment?

confirmModal.title: Discard booking
confirmModal.question: You have unconfirmed data
confirmModal.target: Are you sure you want to leave?

loading.title: Processing cancellation
loading.description: We are cancelling your appointment. This may take a few seconds.

cancelada.title: Appointment cancelled
cancelada.description: Your appointment has been successfully cancelled. If you want, you can book a new time.

ya_cancelada.title: Appointment was already cancelled
ya_cancelada.description: No further action is required. If you wish, you can book a new appointment.

expirada.title: Link expired
expirada.description: The appointment can no longer be cancelled because the date has passed.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.description: The cancellation link is invalid or incomplete.

not_found.title: Appointment not found
not_found.description: We could not find the appointment associated with this link.

error.title: We could not cancel the appointment
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

cancelPage.helper: Do not close this window until finished.
